using Unity.Entities;
using Unity.Burst;
using Unity.Collections;
using Unity.Mathematics;
using Unity.Transforms;

namespace {NAMESPACE}
{
    /// <summary>
    /// A High-Performance, Burst-Compiled System.
    /// Generated by Antigravity DOTS Architect.
    /// </summary>
    [BurstCompile]
    public partial struct {SYSTEM_NAME} : ISystem
    {
        // Use EntityQuery fields if you need complex filtering requiring OnCreate caching
        // private EntityQuery _query;

        [BurstCompile]
        public void OnCreate(ref SystemState state)
        {
            // Validating that the data exists before updating avoids overhead
            state.RequireForUpdate<{REQUIRED_COMPONENT}>();
        }

        [BurstCompile]
        public void OnDestroy(ref SystemState state)
        {
            // Cleanup native collections here if any were allocated
        }

        [BurstCompile]
        public void OnUpdate(ref SystemState state)
        {
            // --- OPTION 1: Main Thread Query (Simplest) ---
            // Use SystemAPI.Query for simple iteration. 
            // - RefRW<T> for Read-Write access
            // - RefRO<T> for Read-Only access (More optimized)
            
            /*
            foreach (var (transform, velocity) in SystemAPI.Query<RefRW<LocalTransform>, RefRO<PhysicsVelocity>>().WithAll<{REQUIRED_COMPONENT}>())
            {
                // Access: transform.ValueRW.Position ... velocity.ValueRO.Linear ...
            }
            */

            // --- OPTION 2: JobChunk (Maximum Parallelism) ---
            // Schedule a parallel job if you have many entities (>1000).
            // var job = new {SYSTEM_NAME}Job
            // {
            //    DeltaTime = SystemAPI.Time.DeltaTime
            // };
            // state.Dependency = job.ScheduleParallel(state.Dependency);
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Optional: Internal Job for parallel execution
    /// </summary>
    /*
    [BurstCompile]
    public partial struct {SYSTEM_NAME}Job : IJobEntity
    {
        public float DeltaTime;

        private void Execute(ref LocalTransform transform, in PhysicsVelocity velocity)
        {
            // Logic implementation
        }
    }
    */
}
